item.title: Meeting a General on Omaha Beach
item.description: Watch a firsthand encounter with a general on Omaha Beach. Hear stories and reflections from this historic D-Day location during a memorable meeting.

media:content.media:title: Meeting a General on Omaha Beach
media:content.media:description: Watch a firsthand encounter with a general on Omaha Beach. Hear stories and reflections from this historic D-Day location during a memorable meeting.

item.title: Our Last Meal Before Iwo Jima
item.description: A veteran recalls the final meal before heading into the battle of Iwo Jima. Hear the memories, emotions, and camaraderie before one of WWII’s fiercest battles.

media:content.media:title: Our Last Meal Before Iwo Jima
media:content.media:description: A veteran recalls the final meal before heading into the battle of Iwo Jima. Hear the memories, emotions, and camaraderie before one of WWII’s fiercest battles.

item.title: Turning the Tide with Limited Ammunition
item.description: Watch a tense scenario where strategy overcomes limited resources. See how careful planning and skill help achieve success despite low ammunition.

media:content.media:title: Turning the Tide with Limited Ammunition
media:content.media:description: Watch a tense scenario where strategy overcomes limited resources. See how careful planning and skill help achieve success despite low ammunition.

item.title: ‘Top Gun’ Flight Scenes Were Extremely Tough
item.description: Discover the challenges behind Top Gun’s iconic flight scenes. Pilots share the intense physical and technical demands of filming high-speed aerial maneuvers.

media:content.media:title: ‘Top Gun’ Flight Scenes Were Extremely Tough
media:content.media:description: Discover the challenges behind Top Gun’s iconic flight scenes. Pilots share the intense physical and technical demands of filming high-speed aerial maneuvers.

item.title: Eliminating Targets One at a Time
item.description: Watch a precise and methodical approach to taking out targets. See the strategy, focus, and technique used to succeed step by step.

media:content.media:title: Eliminating Targets One at a Time
media:content.media:description: Watch a precise and methodical approach to taking out targets. See the strategy, focus, and technique used to succeed step by step.

item.title: Ross McCall Honors Easy Company Heroes
item.description: Ross McCall highlights the untold stories of Easy Company’s unsung heroes. Learn about their bravery, teamwork, and contributions during historic missions.

media:content.media:title: Ross McCall Honors Easy Company Heroes
media:content.media:description: Ross McCall highlights the untold stories of Easy Company’s unsung heroes. Learn about their bravery, teamwork, and contributions during historic missions.

item.title: I Was the Last One Alive
item.description: A firsthand account of surviving when everyone else is gone. Witness the challenges, strategy, and emotions of being the last person standing.

media:content.media:title: I Was the Last One Alive
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account of surviving when everyone else is gone. Witness the challenges, strategy, and emotions of being the last person standing.

item.title: Former Marine Shares Untold Story
item.description: A former Marine opens up about a story he kept private for years. Hear his firsthand experiences, challenges, and reflections from his service.

media:content.media:title: Former Marine Shares Untold Story
media:content.media:description: A former Marine opens up about a story he kept private for years. Hear his firsthand experiences, challenges, and reflections from his service.

item.title: Afghanistan Mission That Feels Unreal
item.description: A veteran recounts an unforgettable Afghanistan mission. Hear the intense moments, challenges, and experiences that still feel surreal today.

media:content.media:title: Afghanistan Mission That Feels Unreal
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts an unforgettable Afghanistan mission. Hear the intense moments, challenges, and experiences that still feel surreal today.

item.title: Why I Received the Medal of Honor
item.description: A veteran explains the actions and bravery that led to receiving the Medal of Honor. Hear the personal story behind this highest military award.

media:content.media:title: Why I Received the Medal of Honor
media:content.media:description: A veteran explains the actions and bravery that led to receiving the Medal of Honor. Hear the personal story behind this highest military award.

item.title: How Rules of Engagement Affected Soldiers’ Lives
item.description: Exploring the impact of rules of engagement on soldiers in combat. Real stories highlight challenges, tough decisions, and the lasting effects on those who serve.

media:content.media:title: How Rules of Engagement Affected Soldiers’ Lives
media:content.media:description: Exploring the impact of rules of engagement on soldiers in combat. Real stories highlight challenges, tough decisions, and the lasting effects on those who serve.
